description: Diff Integrity and Scope: Detect mixed concerns, incomplete changesets, and scope creep.

fixtures.notes: Single commit bundles an unrelated caching feature into OrderService alongside a rename refactor of UserService to AccountService.
New config key 'FeatureFlags:EnableDarkMode' is consumed in code but appsettings.json schema is never updated.
UserRepository is renamed to AccountRepository consistently across all files with no unrelated changes.
New /products endpoint coherently touches controller, service, and model — all changes are directly related.
Payment route is wired up in the router but the handler is a stub containing only a TODO comment.
